goal: is_clique[V](f.src, s) = forall(x0: V, x1: V) { s.contains(x0) and s.contains(x1) and x0 != x1 implies f.src.adj(x0, x1) }

p.c: function[T0](x0: Set[T0], x1: lib(simple_graph).SimpleGraph[T0]) { forall(x2: T0, x3: T0) { not x2 ∈ x0 or not x3 ∈ x0 or x3 = x2 or x1.adj(x2, x3) } = is_clique[T0](x1, x0) }[V](s, f.src)

goal: exists(k0: V) { s.contains(k0) and y1 = f.map(k0) }

p.c: function[T0, T1](x0: Set[T1], x1: T1 -> T0, x2: T0) { not x2 ∈ lib(set).set_image[T1, T0](x0, x1) or exists(k0: T1) { k0 ∈ x0 and x1(k0) = x2 } }[W, V](s, f.map, y1)

goal: exists(k0: V) { s.contains(k0) and y2 = f.map(k0) }

p.c: function[T0, T1](x0: Set[T1], x2: T1 -> T0, x3: T0) { not x3 ∈ lib(set).set_image[T1, T0](x0, x2) or exists(k0: T1) { k0 ∈ x0 and x2(k0) = x3 } }[W, V](s, f.map, y2)

is_clique[W](f.dst, simple_graph_hom_image_set[V, W](f, s)) = forall(x0: W, x1: W) { simple_graph_hom_image_set[V, W](f, s).contains(x0) and simple_graph_hom_image_set[V, W](f, s).contains(x1) and x0 != x1 implies f.dst.adj(x0, x1) }

p.c: function[T0](x0: Set[T0], x1: lib(simple_graph).SimpleGraph[T0]) { forall(x2: T0, x3: T0) { not x2 ∈ x0 or not x3 ∈ x0 or x3 = x2 or x1.adj(x2, x3) } = is_clique[T0](x1, x0) }[W](simple_graph_hom_image_set[V, W](f, s), f.dst)

p.c: function[T0, T2](x0: Set[T0], x1: T0 -> T2, x2: T2) { exists(k0: T0) { k0 ∈ x0 and x1(k0) = x2 } = lib(set).image_contains[T0, T2](x1, x0, x2) }[V, W](s, f.map, bad_y1)

goal: is_clique[V](f.src, s) and s.contains(bad_x1) and s.contains(bad_x2) and bad_x1 != bad_x2
is_independent_set[W](f.dst, t) = forall(x0: W, x1: W) { t.contains(x0) and t.contains(x1) and x0 != x1 implies not f.dst.adj(x0, x1) }

p.c: function[T0](x0: Set[T0], x1: lib(simple_graph).SimpleGraph[T0]) { forall(x2: T0, x3: T0) { not x2 ∈ x0 or not x3 ∈ x0 or x3 = x2 or not x1.adj(x2, x3) } = is_independent_set[T0](x1, x0) }[W](t, f.dst)

goal: is_independent_set[W](f.dst, t) and t.contains(f.map(x1)) and t.contains(f.map(x2)) and f.map(x1) != f.map(x2)

p.c: function[T0](x0: Set[T0], x1: lib(simple_graph).SimpleGraph[T0]) { forall(x2: T0, x3: T0) { not x2 ∈ x0 or not x3 ∈ x0 or x3 = x2 or not x1.adj(x2, x3) } = is_independent_set[T0](x1, x0) }[V](simple_graph_hom_preimage_set[V, W](f, t), f.src)
